flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Waldorf University fell 32% between 2021 and 2024 (31.2% → 21.1%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Waldorf University fell 10% between 2021 and 2024 (2.0k → 1.8k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Waldorf University rose 362% between 2021 and 2024 (4.5% → 20.9%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Waldorf University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.5% → 0.0%).
